# Configuration Reference

RailsKit uses a single configuration file — `railskit.yml` — as the source of truth. Running `bin/setup` generates this file interactively. You can also edit it by hand.

The root `railskit.yml` is processed into `api/config/railskit.yml` (Rails) and `web/src/lib/config.ts` (React) automatically when you run `bin/dev`.

---

## Full Configuration

```yaml
# railskit.yml — Master configuration file
# Generated by bin/setup. Edit freely.

# ─── App ────────────────────────────────────────────────
app:
  name: "My App"                    # Used in emails, titles, meta tags
  domain: "myapp.com"               # Production domain
  tagline: "Ship fast, sleep well"  # Landing page subtitle
  support_email: "help@myapp.com"   # Reply-to for transactional emails

# ─── Database ───────────────────────────────────────────
database:
  adapter: convex                   # convex | supabase | postgres
  # Convex
  convex_url: ${CONVEX_URL}
  convex_deploy_key: ${CONVEX_DEPLOY_KEY}
  # Supabase
  # supabase_url: ${SUPABASE_URL}
  # supabase_key: ${SUPABASE_KEY}
  # PostgreSQL
  # host: localhost
  # port: 5432
  # username: ${DB_USERNAME}
  # password: ${DB_PASSWORD}
  # database: myapp_development

# ─── Auth ───────────────────────────────────────────────
auth:
  provider: devise                  # devise | supabase | clerk
  jwt_secret: ${JWT_SECRET}         # Auto-generated by bin/setup
  session_expiry: 7d                # How long before re-login
  # OAuth providers (leave blank to disable)
  google:
    client_id: ${GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID}
    client_secret: ${GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET}
  # Clerk (if auth.provider is clerk)
  # clerk:
  #   publishable_key: ${CLERK_PUBLISHABLE_KEY}
  #   secret_key: ${CLERK_SECRET_KEY}
  magic_links:
    enabled: true                   # Enable passwordless login
    expiry: 15m                     # Link validity

# ─── Payments ───────────────────────────────────────────
payments:
  provider: stripe                  # stripe | lemon_squeezy
  stripe:
    secret_key: ${STRIPE_SECRET_KEY}
    publishable_key: ${STRIPE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY}
    webhook_secret: ${STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET}
    customer_portal: true           # Enable Stripe customer portal
  # lemon_squeezy:
  #   api_key: ${LEMON_SQUEEZY_API_KEY}
  #   store_id: ${LEMON_SQUEEZY_STORE_ID}
  #   webhook_secret: ${LEMON_SQUEEZY_WEBHOOK_SECRET}
  plans:
    - name: Free
      stripe_price_id: ${STRIPE_FREE_PRICE_ID}
      features:
        api_calls: 100
        agents: 1
        storage_gb: 1
    - name: Pro
      stripe_price_id: ${STRIPE_PRO_PRICE_ID}
      price_monthly: 29
      price_annual: 290
      features:
        api_calls: 10000
        agents: 10
        storage_gb: 50
    - name: Enterprise
      stripe_price_id: ${STRIPE_ENTERPRISE_PRICE_ID}
      price_monthly: 99
      price_annual: 990
      features:
        api_calls: unlimited
        agents: unlimited
        storage_gb: 500

# ─── Email ──────────────────────────────────────────────
email:
  provider: resend                  # resend | postmark | smtp
  from: "hello@myapp.com"          # Default sender
  resend:
    api_key: ${RESEND_API_KEY}
  # postmark:
  #   api_key: ${POSTMARK_API_KEY}
  # smtp:
  #   host: smtp.example.com
  #   port: 587
  #   username: ${SMTP_USERNAME}
  #   password: ${SMTP_PASSWORD}

# ─── AI ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
ai:
  default_model: claude-sonnet-4    # Default model for agents
  providers:
    openai:
      api_key: ${OPENAI_API_KEY}
    anthropic:
      api_key: ${ANTHROPIC_API_KEY}
    google:
      api_key: ${GOOGLE_API_KEY}
    # ollama:
    #   url: http://localhost:11434  # Local models
  cost_tracking:
    enabled: true                   # Track token usage and costs
    alert_threshold: 50.00          # Alert when daily spend exceeds this ($)

# ─── Theme ──────────────────────────────────────────────
theme:
  preset: default                   # default | ocean | sunset | forest | midnight
  dark_mode: true                   # Enable dark mode toggle
  primary_color: "#6366f1"          # Override preset primary
  # Custom colors (override preset)
  # colors:
  #   background: "#ffffff"
  #   foreground: "#0a0a0a"
  #   primary: "#6366f1"
  #   secondary: "#8b5cf6"

# ─── SEO ────────────────────────────────────────────────
seo:
  title: "My App — Ship fast, sleep well"
  description: "Build your SaaS faster with RailsKit."
  og_image: "/og-image.png"         # Open Graph image (place in web/public/)
  twitter_handle: "@myapp"
  google_analytics: ${GA_TRACKING_ID}
  # plausible:
  #   domain: myapp.com
  #   script_url: https://plausible.io/js/script.js

# ─── Deploy ─────────────────────────────────────────────
deploy:
  target: render                    # render | docker | railway
  region: us-east                   # Deployment region
```

---

## Environment Variables

All sensitive values use `${VAR}` syntax in `railskit.yml` and resolve from environment variables. Copy `.env.example` to `.env` for local development.

### Required Variables (depends on your choices)

| Variable | When Required | Get It From |
|---|---|---|
| `JWT_SECRET` | Always (auto-generated) | `bin/setup` generates this |
| `STRIPE_SECRET_KEY` | payments.provider = stripe | [Stripe Dashboard](https://dashboard.stripe.com/apikeys) |
| `STRIPE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY` | payments.provider = stripe | Stripe Dashboard |
| `STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET` | payments.provider = stripe | Stripe Dashboard → Webhooks |
| `RESEND_API_KEY` | email.provider = resend | [Resend Dashboard](https://resend.com/api-keys) |
| `OPENAI_API_KEY` | ai.providers.openai configured | [OpenAI Platform](https://platform.openai.com/api-keys) |
| `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY` | ai.providers.anthropic configured | [Anthropic Console](https://console.anthropic.com/) |
| `GOOGLE_API_KEY` | ai.providers.google configured | [Google AI Studio](https://aistudio.google.com/) |
| `GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID` | auth.google configured | [Google Cloud Console](https://console.cloud.google.com/) |
| `GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET` | auth.google configured | Google Cloud Console |
| `CONVEX_URL` | database.adapter = convex | [Convex Dashboard](https://dashboard.convex.dev/) |
| `CONVEX_DEPLOY_KEY` | database.adapter = convex | Convex Dashboard |
| `SUPABASE_URL` | database.adapter = supabase | [Supabase Dashboard](https://supabase.com/dashboard) |
| `SUPABASE_KEY` | database.adapter = supabase | Supabase Dashboard |

### The `.env.example` File

```bash
# .env.example — Copy to .env and fill in your values
# Only fill in the ones relevant to your railskit.yml choices

# Auth
JWT_SECRET=generated-by-bin-setup

# Stripe
STRIPE_SECRET_KEY=sk_test_...
STRIPE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY=pk_test_...
STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET=whsec_...

# Email (Resend)
RESEND_API_KEY=re_...

# AI Providers (fill in the ones you use)
OPENAI_API_KEY=sk-...
ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=sk-ant-...
GOOGLE_API_KEY=AI...

# OAuth
GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID=...
GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET=...

# Database (Convex)
CONVEX_URL=https://...
CONVEX_DEPLOY_KEY=...

# Database (Supabase — if using)
# SUPABASE_URL=https://...
# SUPABASE_KEY=eyJ...

# Database (Postgres — if using)
# DATABASE_URL=postgres://user:pass@localhost:5432/myapp_dev
```

---

## Accessing Config in Code

### Rails (API)

```ruby
# Anywhere in your Rails app
RailsKit.config.app.name           # => "My App"
RailsKit.config.ai.default_model   # => "claude-sonnet-4"
RailsKit.config.payments.provider  # => "stripe"

# Check feature availability
RailsKit.config.ai?               # => true (AI configured)
RailsKit.config.payments?         # => true (payments configured)
```

### React (Frontend)

```typescript
// web/src/lib/config.ts (auto-generated from railskit.yml)
import { config } from '@/lib/config';

config.app.name       // "My App"
config.theme.preset   // "default"
config.seo.title      // "My App — Ship fast, sleep well"
```

Only non-sensitive values are exposed to the frontend. API keys never appear in `config.ts`.

---

## Regenerating Config

If you edit `railskit.yml` by hand, regenerate the derived configs:

```bash
bin/railskit config:generate
```

This updates `api/config/railskit.yml` and `web/src/lib/config.ts`.

---

## Theme Presets

| Preset | Primary | Vibe |
|---|---|---|
| `default` | Indigo (#6366f1) | Clean, professional |
| `ocean` | Cyan (#06b6d4) | Cool, techy |
| `sunset` | Orange (#f97316) | Warm, energetic |
| `forest` | Green (#22c55e) | Natural, calm |
| `midnight` | Violet (#8b5cf6) | Dark-first, modern |

Override any color in the `theme.colors` section.
